archetypes.name: Chamber of Purity
archetypes.desc:
- Purifier Squads can be taken as Troops.
- All other Troops become Elite choices.

archetypes.name: Hall of Champions
archetypes.desc:
- Paladin Squads can be taken as Troops.
- All other Troops become Elite choices.

archetypes.name: Chamber Militant
archetypes.desc:
- The army has access to units from Codex: Assassins.
- The army has access to units from Codex: Inquisition.
- Treat the Inquisition units as if "Ordo Malleus" was selected as Legacy.

legacies.name: Blades of Victory
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Inescapable Pursuit" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Exactors
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Purge Soul" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Prescient Brethren
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Fatal Precognition" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Preservers
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Aegis Eternal" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Rapiers
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Symphonic Strike" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Silver Blades
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Temporal Accuracy" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Swordbearers
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Empyric Lodestone" psychic power in addition.

legacies.name: Wardmakers
legacies.desc: All Psykers know the "Projection of Purity" psychic power in addition.
